title: Nursery Rhyme. CIII. Proverbs.
content:
In July,
        Some reap rye;
                In August,
        If one will not the other must.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CIII. Proverbs." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
